description_long: This is a rectangular marble monument with a broad, flat face featuring a large bronze plaque. The plaque is mounted centrally on the front and displays a raised relief of a mounted figure, surrounded by an oval laurel motif, along with inscribed text. The monument is constructed from white marble with subtle gray veining, giving it a stately and durable appearance. The base is a thick, rectangular slab that extends slightly beyond the main body, providing stability and a sense of permanence. The sides and back are plain, with no visible ornamentation or inscriptions. The overall design is simple and solemn, suitable for commemorative or memorial purposes in public urban spaces.
description: A rectangular white marble monument with a bronze commemorative plaque on the front, set on a broad, solid base. The design is simple and dignified, with a focus on the inscribed plaque.
description_view_0: The front view shows the large bronze plaque with a relief and inscription, mounted on the smooth marble face.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the monument's thickness and plain marble surface, with the plaque edge just visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays a completely plain marble surface with no inscriptions or decorations.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the monument's depth and the edge of the bronze plaque.
attribute_inscription: A large bronze plaque on the front face contains an inscription in English, with raised lettering and a relief image. The text is legible and formal, commemorating Robert E. Lee and the Dixie Highway.
attribute_ornamentation: The only ornamentation is the raised relief of a mounted figure and laurel motif on the bronze plaque. No other decorative elements are visible.
attribute_base_design: The base is a thick, rectangular marble slab, slightly wider and deeper than the main body, with a flat top and subtle green moss or weathering at the bottom edges.
attribute_tip_design: The top of the monument is flat and unadorned, with no unique features or decorations.
